sampling.method: Sort ascending by SHA256(seed + '|' + source_id), then take the first 10

methods: PDF page and key figure/table visual inspection
cross-check of all eight delivered CSV tables
run-boundary, units, values, completeness, and provenance review

overall_assessment.summary: Core explicit table values are generally recognizable and often accurate, but systematic unsupported defaults, cross-run contamination, missing experiments, conflict suppression, unit violations, and weak field-level provenance require correction.

sample_results.strength: Mn-series conditions, carbon yields, diameter ranges, and Raman trend match the paper.
The main PECVD catalyst, gas ratio, bias, time, and growth-window concepts match the paper.
Tail-gas composition and the principal FCNT/RCNT yield and property values are supported.
Composite preparation and the main M-pCNT mechanical property values are correct.
Most time, temperature, feed-flow, yield, BET, and diameter grid values are accurately transcribed.
The atmospheric plasma-reactor concept, substrate, power, speed, and general MWCNT outcome are supported.
Substrate, gas composition, temperature ramp, catalyst size, and Raman/RBM data match the paper.
Small and scale-up fluidized-bed table values are transcribed with high numerical fidelity.
The repeated-run setup and three catalyst-phase pathway groups are substantially correct.
The general conclusion that diverse hydrocarbon feeds can grow SWCNT forests is represented.

recommended_actions: Block automatic filling of atmospheric/101.325 kPa when pressure is not explicitly reported.
Introduce run-level inheritance allowlists and prevent result fields from crossing run or sample boundaries.
Retain original units, approximation markers, and reported/normalized/calculated/figure_digitized status.
Preserve series-specific conflicting observations instead of silently deduplicating them.
Reconcile paper table or legend member counts against source_run to detect missing and failed campaigns.
Bind each critical field group to the actual page, table, figure, or paragraph that supports it.
Separate composite-performance studies from CNT-synthesis schema semantics.
